title: Multiple failed SSH logins against web server
analyst_note: Repeated failures against a privileged account from an external address.
false_positive_hint: Confirm whether this IP belongs to an approved administrator VPN range.

title: Successful login after repeated failures
analyst_note: Success after failures increases likelihood of account compromise.
false_positive_hint: Check change ticket or emergency access record before containment.

title: Suspicious PowerShell encoded command
analyst_note: Encoded command execution should be correlated with parent process and recent downloads.
false_positive_hint: Some admin tools use encoded PowerShell during endpoint management.

title: PowerShell spawned network connection
analyst_note: Network activity following encoded execution should be treated as suspicious until validated.
false_positive_hint: Verify whether destination is part of a known software update or management service.

title: Known scanner user-agent observed
analyst_note: Low-confidence internet scanning pattern with no authentication attempt.
false_positive_hint: Confirm this is not the company vulnerability scanner before blocking.

title: Unusual account discovery command
analyst_note: Discovery from a finance workstation should be reviewed with recent login and process history.
false_positive_hint: Check whether IT support was troubleshooting local account permissions.

title: Suspicious archive creation after discovery
analyst_note: Archive creation after discovery may indicate staging activity.
false_positive_hint: Confirm whether the user was performing an approved finance export.

title: Obfuscated script blocked by endpoint control
analyst_note: Blocked execution still needs user-awareness follow-up if delivered through email.
false_positive_hint: Review file hash and email gateway verdict before closing as prevented.
